landing.heroLead: Turn memories into a picturebook starring your little
landing.heroSubtitle: Upload photos, and let Storywink.ai turn everyday adventures into charming stories.
landing.howItWorksAlt: How Storywink works: pick your photos, we bring it to life, a book they'll treasure
landing.faq1Q: How does Storywink.ai create personalized storybooks?
landing.faq1A: Simply upload photos of your child, and our AI will transform them into beautiful illustrated characters. We then craft engaging stories around their adventures, making them the hero of their own tale.
landing.faq2Q: What age group is Storywink.ai designed for?
landing.faq2A: Our storybooks are perfect for toddlers and young children aged 2-8 years old. The stories are crafted with age-appropriate language and themes that engage young minds.
landing.faq3Q: How long does it take to create a storybook?
landing.faq3A: The story is ready to read in about a minute, and the fully illustrated book usually takes 10-15 minutes. We'll let you know the moment it's done.
landing.faq4A: Yes — tell us what happened in the photos, pick the art style, and edit any page's words whenever you like.
landing.faq5Q: Is my child's data and photos safe?
landing.faq5A: We take your family's privacy seriously. Your photos are used only to make your book — they're processed by trusted AI partners (OpenAI and Google) that write and illustrate it, and stored securely with Cloudinary. We never sell your data, and we'll delete your photos whenever you ask.

create.createFailedHint: Your photos are safe — give it another go.
create.noPhotos: Add at least one photo to continue.
create.notReady: Just a moment — getting things ready.
create.photosLeftBehind: {count, plural, one {1 photo was} other {# photos were}} still uploading, so we went ahead without {count, plural, one {it} other {them}}. You can add more on the next screen.
create.tipVariety: Mix different moments — places, faces, little details.
create.tipArc: A beginning, a middle, and an end give the story its shape.
create.tipSkipDupes: Skip near-duplicates — one photo per moment is plenty.

upload.optimizeHint: Big photos are optimized automatically — no need to shrink them first.
upload.errorTooBig: That photo is too large. Please pick one under 10MB.
upload.errorWrongType: That file isn't a photo. Use JPG, PNG, WebP, or HEIC.
upload.errorWrongTypeSome: Skipped {count, plural, one {# file that wasn't a photo} other {# files that weren't photos}}.
upload.errorCapReached: You can add up to {max} photos per book.
upload.errorSomeFailed: {count, plural, one {# photo didn't upload} other {# photos didn't upload}} — tap to retry.
upload.errorNetwork: Upload didn't go through. Check your connection and retry.
upload.errorGeneric: Something went wrong with that photo. Please try again.
